title: About Me
text:
I am a Statistics and Analytics student at UNC Chapel Hill. After graduation, I plan to pursue a Master’s degree to continue my education and deepen my knowledge in statistics and data science.
I have proficient experience with tools like R, Python, and SQL, and I have built projects analyzing large datasets to understand patterns and relationships.
